design_philosophy: Clean, minimal, and highly accessible healthcare dashboard with low cognitive load. Emphasizes data clarity, trust-building via calm palettes, and frictionless workflows.

body.style: Crisp and highly legible for data tables and forms.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for cards (p-6) to ensure breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-lg or rounded-xl (max 8px to 12px) for a subtle, friendly, yet professional look.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for all tabular and form data for rapid scanning. Metrics in cards left-aligned with top-right icons.

metric_cards.style: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no heavy drop shadow (use shadow-sm max). Background white.
metric_cards.layout: Flex column, gap-2, value in text-3xl font-semibold, label in text-sm text-muted-foreground.

tables.style: Cardless or bordered container. Clean rows with hover:bg-muted/50. Use text-sm for data density.

forms.style: Use Shadcn Input and Select. Generous spacing (gap-6) between form fields. Focus rings must be primary color.
forms.file_upload: Custom drag-and-drop zone. Dashed border (border-2 border-dashed border-border), bg-muted/20, hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors, centered upload icon.

buttons.style: Primary buttons: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90. Fully rounded or rounded-lg.

interactions.hover: Subtle background color shifts on table rows and interactive elements. Avoid excessive transforms.
interactions.focus: Clear focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2 on all inputs for accessibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement two main views: 1) Dashboard with 4 metric cards (Referrals, Pending, Conversion %, Non-admit) and a Pending Referrals List. 2) 'Add New Referral' form page.
Use Lucide-react for icons (e.g., Users, Activity, FileText, UploadCloud).
Implement Shadcn UI components for Table, Form, Input, Select, and Button.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., data-testid='metric-total-referrals', data-testid='add-referral-btn').
Keep the design extremely clean, prioritizing white space, clear typography (Work Sans for headers, IBM Plex Sans for body), and minimal borders.
Use a sidebar or top navigation for routing between 'Dashboard' and 'Add Referral'.
For the file upload in the 'Add Referral' form, implement a UI that looks like a drag-and-drop zone (dashed border, upload icon, clear instructions).
Avoid using teal or purple; stick to the provided primary blue (#0284C7) and slate grays to maintain the clinical, trustworthy archetype.
Override default shadcn component colors in tailwind.config.js to match the provided color palette (e.g. primary should be #0284C7).
Add 'Work Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' to index.html or global css imports.
